title: AANA Governance / Compliance Policy Diagnostic
public_claim_boundary: This experiment evaluates AANA as a policy-bound audit/routing layer. It does not claim legal, regulatory, platform-policy, or compliance certification. Human-reviewed labels are required before stronger claims.
objective: Measure whether AANA can route policy-bound answers/actions using policy evidence, citation coverage, missing-evidence checks, and human-review escalation.

datasets.purpose: External policy-document source boundary and metadata validation. PDF contents are not used for automatic labels in v1.
Small AANA-heldout policy cases with explicit labels for route, missing evidence, and human-review escalation.

outputs.raw_text_storage: Raw policy text, requests, and candidates are not written to result artifacts; rows contain ids, hashes, expected/actual routes, evidence counts, risk domain, missing-evidence flags, and human-review flags.
